address.Address: A-104-A, behind Courier Service (Domestic & International), A-Block, Sector 61, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

school_address.streetAddress: A-104-A, behind Courier Service (Domestic & International), A-Block, Sector 61, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301, India

reviews.author: Rishabh Rawat
reviews.review_body:
Worst school ever. They do not care about the facilities, ur child's future. They care only about one thing that is money. The fees is very high i.e. ₹1.20 laks p.a. Don't let ur child study here. Just a waste of time and money. Many cases of bullying, beating, fighting, ragging, wape, drugs but no action has been taken on. Also the teachers are not skilled. Transport is very high i.e. ₹4-5000 per month but no facilities. Most of the buses do not have a first aid kit.
Not even a skilled doctor. No summer camp, no creative club. Overall, the worst school in the whole Noida.

reviews.author: RO REPAIR Rawat
reviews.review_body: Not at all a good school. They take ₹1.20 lakh p.a. but r not providing us with proper facilities. No proper canteen, no auditorium, no A/C buses, no smart way of studying. The smartboards r just a showpiece. Most of them don't work. Some work  but are outdated. Also the transport fee is so high i.e. ₹4-5000 per month. Coming by an auto rickshaw would be cheaper. Also many good teachers left the school. The new teachers are not at all skilled. Also, they say that there are many sports in school but in reality, there are very less equipments and the too are broken or damaged. The bats are damaged, stumps are broken, football doesn't have air. Also, they say that there are many clubs in the school (14 creative clubs) but in reality there are no clubs.

reviews.author: Shreejee Foods
reviews.review_body: Best school and fees is low budget teacher behaviour is very polite and good teacher

reviews.author: Vivek Srivastava
reviews.review_body:
One of the worst school.
For Nursery entrance  3 teacher seats and take interview of 4 year kid and finally they are not selected my Kid who is selected in DPS Noida after that.
I don't understand the procedure they have for entrance, all are just a way of earning nothing else.

reviews.author: Mohit Chauhan
reviews.review_body:
Putting mental pressure and still giving online material for the work and saying " we will not share any material online to avoid screentime" is a biggest irony. I don't know whether the school staff will read this review and take action on it but its just a status symbol for most of the parents nothing else.
Giving many worksheets left no time with students to do the self study or self exploration. They say "we believe in passion of children but we will not give them time to explore their passion"
.
2 assignment sheets per day and not giving even a single day in between just rat race and syllabus complete.

Most people preferred this school bcoz they think that it must be the good school nature bcoz all so called showoff people children study here but it totally opposite.
This school is famous for aggroancy in child. Children literally do 18+ talk which is the worst atmosphere.

I request this school to reduce the homework load from kids and stop being a hypocrite.

Regards
Ex-student.
